startPoint.en: Speak to Skippy located south-east of the town of Rimmington.
startPoint.es: Habla con Skippy, situado al sureste de la ciudad de Rimmington.

rewards.name: Mogre
rewards.display: Ability to slay mogres at level 32 Slayer.

rewards.name: Giant crab
rewards.display: Ability to own a giant crab pet, after completing the Freeing Pirate Pete subquest of Recipe for Disaster (with level 40 Summoning).

text.en: Talk to Skippy, south-west of the Port Sarim lodestone.
text.es: Habla con Skippy, al suroeste de la piedra de viaje de Port Sarim. (opciones de chat: 2 ¿Quiénes son (pausa dramática) ELLOS?)
Haz clic derecho en Skippy, Espabilar.

text.en: Talk to Skippy again to give him nettle tea.
text.es: Vuelve a hablar con Skippy para darle té de ortiga.

text.en: Make a hangover cure by using chocolate dust on a bucket of milk, then snape grass on chocolatey milk.
text.es: Prepara una cura para la resaca usando polvo de chocolate en un cubo de leche, y luego hierba snape en la leche achocolatada.
Dale a Skippy la cura para la resaca.
